title: orobanche littoralis
intro:
Orobanche littoralis is a parasitic plant species that belongs to the broomrape family (Orobanchaceae), known for its ability to obtain nutrients by connecting to the roots of other plants.

This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antimalarial, antibacterial, and antifungal activities, making it a potential source of new medicines. The health benefits associated with Orobanche littoralis include its ability to treat various infections, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Traditional herbal preparations include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
